headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels files routine patent applications in cloud infrastructure

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and do not indicate immediate or significant financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
